raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 is resting on top of box_1 with its left, right and front faces unobstructed; sufficient space exists on both lateral sides for the two arms to approach simultaneously without colliding with the stack or table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is firmly held by both end-effectors, lifted a few centimeters clear of box_1, and is under full control of the robot."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "clear tabletop area front-right of the box stack",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding box_2 and the designated region on the table (front-right quadrant) is free of obstacles and large enough to accommodate a 30×30×30 cm box.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is placed stably on the table in the specified area, no longer obstructing access to box_1, and both arms are released."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is now exposed on the tabletop with its lateral faces accessible; there is clear space on both sides for the dual-arm approach and no objects above it.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely grasped with both arms, lifted clear of the tabletop—fulfilling the task requirement of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 is resting on top of box_1 with its left, right and front faces unobstructed; sufficient space exists on both lateral sides for the two arms to approach simultaneously without colliding with the stack or table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is firmly held by both end-effectors, lifted a few centimeters clear of box_1, and is under full control of the robot.

parsed_json.Target: clear tabletop area front-right of the box stack
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding box_2 and the designated region on the table (front-right quadrant) is free of obstacles and large enough to accommodate a 30×30×30 cm box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is placed stably on the table in the specified area, no longer obstructing access to box_1, and both arms are released.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is now exposed on the tabletop with its lateral faces accessible; there is clear space on both sides for the dual-arm approach and no objects above it.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely grasped with both arms, lifted clear of the tabletop—fulfilling the task requirement of picking up the darker box.
